common.confirmDelete: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

auth.resetEmailSent: Check your inbox for a reset link.
auth.passwordUpdated: Password updated. You can sign in now.
auth.tagline: Beautiful digital menus your guests will love.
auth.checkEmail: Check your inbox to confirm your email.
auth.waitstaffDesc: Enter your restaurant code and your 4-digit PIN to access your portal.

orders.title: Recent Orders
orders.subtitle: Review orders sent to WhatsApp.
orders.emptyHint: When customers send an order via WhatsApp, it will appear here for your records.

tables.title: Table Management
tables.subtitle: Manage tables and generate specific QR codes for each.
tables.emptyHint: Create tables to generate dedicated QR codes for your customers.
tables.disabledHint: Your menu is currently inactive. Please upgrade your subscription to generate and manage table QR codes.

promotions.title: Promotions & Upselling
promotions.subtitle: Manage featured items, special combos, happy hours, and upselling rules.
promotions.bannerDesc: Display a banner at the top of your menu.
promotions.emptyBanners: No banners active. Create one to highlight a special offer.
promotions.comboDesc: Group items together for a special price.
promotions.happyHourDesc: Automatically discount items during specific hours.
promotions.upsellingDesc: Suggest "You may also like" products to customers.
promotions.emptyUpselling: No upselling rules defined. Start recommending sides or drinks!

referrals.title: Partner Program
referrals.subtitle: Refer other restaurants and earn money for each successful subscription.
referrals.subtitleAlt: Share your code and track your earnings.
referrals.partnerDesc: Get your unique referral code. When a restaurant uses your code, they get a 50 DT discount (paying only 250 DT), and you earn a 50 DT commission once they subscribe!
referrals.shareHint: Share this code. They get 50 DT off, you get 50 DT.
referrals.emptyHistory: You haven't referred any restaurants yet. Share your code to start earning!

subscriptionWarning.title: Your menu is currently hidden from the public.
subscriptionWarning.desc: You are on the free tier (max 3 categories, 9 products). Upgrade your plan to unlock unlimited products and make your QR code live.

analytics_dashboard.title: Analytics V2
analytics_dashboard.lockedDesc: Upgrade to a paid subscription to access detailed analytics, top products, category performance, and hourly activity.

overview.title: Restaurant overview
overview.subtitle: Admin console
overview.emptyRecent: No products yet. Add your first to populate your menu.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Organize your menu into sections
categories.emptyHint: Group your products by section: Starters, Mains, Drinks…

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Everything you serve
products.emptyHint: Add your first dish to bring your menu to life.

qr.title: QR Code
qr.subtitle: Print, place, and let guests scan
qr.instructionsTitle: Place it where your guests will see it
qr.i1: Print on durable card stock and laminate for table use.
qr.i2: Test the scan with your phone before printing in volume.
qr.i3: Add a short prompt like 'Scan to see the menu' for clarity.

onboarding.intro: Let's set up your restaurant in under 10 minutes.
onboarding.doneHint: Your menu is live. Print your QR code to share it with guests.

menu.noProducts: No products in this category yet.
menu.previewMode: PREVIEW MODE — This menu is hidden from the public until you activate your subscription.
menu.inactiveMenu: This restaurant's digital menu is currently inactive. Please check back later.
menu.preparingDesc: The chef is preparing your meal.

landing.lede: Create a beautiful multilingual menu, generate a QR code, and let guests order from any table — all in under 10 minutes.
landing.f1Desc: Arabic, French, English — switched instantly, with proper RTL.
landing.f2Desc: A menu that loads fast, looks premium, and is easy to scan.
landing.f3Desc: Update prices and dishes once — guests always see the latest.
landing.heroTitle: Turn Your Restaurant Menu Into a Premium Digital Experience
landing.heroSubtitle: Create interactive QR menus in minutes. Update prices instantly, showcase dishes with photos, and give customers a modern experience.
landing.mockupUpdateSubtitle: Price changes sync in real time
landing.mockupDishHint: Tap for ingredients, allergens, and chef notes
landing.demoCopy: The embedded menu demonstrates the exact customer experience: browse categories, search dishes, open product details, and see how live updates feel on mobile.
landing.featuresTitle: A Premium Toolkit For Modern Restaurants
landing.featuresIntro: Every interaction is tuned to feel like a high-end SaaS product: clear, fast, and polished enough to convert restaurant owners.

features.interactiveDesc: Present dishes with polished layouts, rich visuals, and seamless category browsing on any device.
features.qrDesc: Create branded QR codes instantly and turn every table, flyer, or receipt into a menu entry point.
features.updatesDesc: Edit prices, availability, and specials from one dashboard and publish changes instantly.
features.analyticsDesc: Track scans, views, and conversions to understand what guests actually explore.
features.brandingDesc: Match your colors, logo, and tone of voice so the menu feels like a polished extension of your brand.
features.languagesDesc: Serve more guests with English, French, Arabic, and any language your restaurant needs.

landing.analyticsIntro: See which dishes attract attention, when guests scan most often, and how your menu converts interest into action.
landing.partnersIntro: Bring restaurants onto Bon Plan and earn recurring commission when they subscribe. It’s a clean, affiliate-style growth loop built for creators, agencies, and hospitality partners.
landing.partnersFlowCopy: Transparent commissions and clean partner reporting
landing.finalBadge: Ready to convert more scans into orders?
landing.finalTitle: Ready To Modernize Your Restaurant Menu?
landing.finalCopy: Launch a premium QR menu experience that feels fast, modern, and built for conversion.
landing.finalCard1Copy: Built to drive menu scans and subscriptions.
landing.finalCard2Copy: Subtle animations give the product a premium feel.
landing.finalCard3Copy: Dark glass panels, gradients, and crisp typography.

subscription.title: Subscription & Plan
subscription.subtitle: Manage your access and upgrades.
subscription.freeDesc: Your restaurant is currently on the free tier. Your public QR menu is hidden and you are limited to 3 categories and 9 products.
subscription.premiumDesc: Your menu is fully unlocked! Your QR code is live and you can create unlimited categories and products.
subscription.refDesc: If you were referred by an agent, enter their code below. To upgrade your account and unlock your menu, please contact support to arrange payment.
subscription.refApplied: Referral code applied. Please contact the platform owner to complete your payment and activate your account.
subscription.waMsgNormal: Hello, I would like to activate my account for my restaurant: {{name}}.
subscription.waMsgReferred: Hello, I would like to activate my account for my restaurant: {{name}}. I used the referral code {{code}}, so my price is 250 DT.
